_doc: Portal (POR) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/por.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 85C / 55U / 55R / 0M. Collation: sequential, 10x11 sheets, seeded color-pair runs. Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Notes: Small set with extra commons. Pre-foil era (1997), no foils. Each pack carries a 'tip card' (marketing/ad card, treated as adCard). Four variations of each basic land; 2 basic lands per pack via the seeded run. Printed in English in the USA (Belgian existence unknown). 36 packs per box. Some cards have alternate starter-deck versions with extra reminder text.

draft.tagline: 9 commons · 3 uncommons · 1× rare · 1 basic land · no foil
